title: viburnum cylindricum var. crassifolium
intro: Viburnum cylindricum var. crassifolium, also known as the Chinese Wayfaring Tree or Wayfaring Tree, is a shrub or small tree native to China and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of Viburnum cylindricum var. crassifolium include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and provide relief from headaches and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and bark in hot water or by using a tincture.
